     the Fermi energy is    -0.1615 ev

!    total energy              =  -11738.26260145 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          3.2E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08756930 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11738.17503216 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -237594.01760191 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  119909.24640301 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4202.94076051 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  110152.54318571 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.00625846 Ry

     total magnetization       =    42.02 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    52.77 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  39 iterations
